The '''Doornik-319 system''' was a system in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]]—part of the [[Farlax sector/Legends|Farlax sector]]—that contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Doornik-319]] and its [[Star/Legends|star]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Shield of Lies (abridged audiobook)|''Shield of Lies'' abridged audiobook]]
